calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73265705 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73265705/events/evt-petition-disposition -maxdepth 4 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73265705 --event evt-petition-disposition; find data/cases/scotus/73265705 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73265705/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt; sed -n '1,240p' data

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '240,460p' data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json; sed -n '1,520p' data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '500,1120p' data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1121,1715p' data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"fold -w 120 data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | wc -l; fold -w 120 data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | sed -n '1,520p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"fold -w 120 data/cases/scotus/73265705/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | sed -n '115,285p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":18000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|fedcourts|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|Federal Circuit|2025 Term|2024 Term|fee\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,175p' metrics/statpack.md; rg -n 'salience|Federal Circuit|\"2025\"|\"2024\"|fee_class|relist|cvsg' metrics/statpack.json | head -160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '3600,3705p' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"inter partes review\" \"314(d)\" institution",court:["scotus"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:5,fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition granted --limit 5","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73265705/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z; date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73265705/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/prediction.json
+{

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(JSON.stringify(r));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short; find data/cases/scotus/73265705/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort; git diff --check -- data/cases/scotus/73265705/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);
